metadata.description: OpenProse — a programming language for AI sessions that structures English into unambiguous control flow for multi-agent orchestration

plugins.name: open-prose
plugins.description: Runs OpenProse *.prose.md services and systems. When the user invokes `prose`, read the contract, spawn subagents when the system requires them, pass artifacts through bindings, and write run state to `.agents/prose/runs/`. Requires a subagent primitive for multi-agent systems; single services run inline.
